name: stackra/exceptions
purpose: Structured exception hierarchy, JSON error renderer, sensitive-data masking, Sentry context enrichment, and Spatie Ignition + Laravel AI solution providers.
capabilities: StackraException base with translation + user-message + masking
Structured JSON LogReporter with PSR-3 severity mapping
Ignition solutions + optional AI hints via laravel/ai
when_to_use: Every Stackra backend app boots this via ExceptionsBootstrap::configure() to get uniform error responses.
when_not_to_use: For domain-level guard-clause helpers, reach for stackra/foundation's Assert class instead.
